chapter_title.en: The Exclusive Honors that Allah has Reserved for the Believers

text: 74 - وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: إن الله عز وجل خلق طينة المؤمن من طينة الأنبياء، فلن تخبث أبدا.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 74. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: Allah [M.G] created the essence of a believer from the essence of the Prophets. Thus, it can never become wicked.
